prompt:
Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: web application UI concept, desktop dashboard screen
Primary request: Design a polished host dashboard for a debt tracker web app similar in business depth to Zoho Invoice, but focused on debt collection and repayment tracking. Include Google login state, Google Calendar connection, WhatsApp reminders, customer debt profiles, debt entries, partial payments, payment history, overdue status, proof/document uploads, reports, and reminder tone settings.
Screen content: left sidebar navigation with Dashboard, Customers, Debts, Payments, WhatsApp Reminders, Calendar, Reports, Settings; top bar with business name, Google account badge, Connect Google Calendar status, and user menu; main dashboard with total outstanding, overdue amount, collected this month, upcoming promises to pay, risk customers, reminder queue, calendar agenda, recent payments, and chart panels.
Style/medium: clean modern SaaS dashboard, bright fintech style, white surfaces, mint green accents, navy text, subtle amber overdue indicators, crisp icons, high-fidelity product mockup
Composition/framing: 16:9 desktop screenshot, full dashboard visible, dense but organized operational layout
Text (verbatim): "DebtFlow", "Google connected", "WhatsApp Reminder Queue", "Upcoming on Google Calendar", "Overdue", "Partial Paid", "Send Reminder"
Constraints: make it look like a real usable web app; legible UI text where possible; no brand logos except generic Google/WhatsApp-style labels; no marketing landing page; no decorative illustration hero; avoid fake browser chrome; avoid watermark
constraints: legible UI; no watermark; no marketing hero; no trademarked logos

prompt:
Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: web application UI concept, desktop dashboard screen
Primary request: Design a warm small-business debt tracker dashboard for shop owners and service providers. The app tracks customer debts and collections, with built-in WhatsApp reminder culture, Google login, and Google Calendar sync.
Screen content: left navigation, customer search, total owed, due today, promised payments, overdue debts, WhatsApp follow-up cards with friendly message tone selector, Google Calendar panel showing payment follow-up appointments, recent customer timeline, document proof thumbnails, and quick action buttons for Add Debt, Record Payment, Send WhatsApp, Schedule Follow-up.
Style/medium: approachable small business accounting app, soft off-white background, teal, coral, charcoal, and warm yellow accents; human and friendly but still professional; compact cards with clear hierarchy
Composition/framing: 16:9 desktop dashboard with a host/admin overview, no hero section
Text (verbatim): "OweTrack", "Sign in with Google", "Calendar synced", "Friendly reminder", "Promise to pay", "Record Payment", "WhatsApp Follow-up"
Constraints: make it practical for daily debt collection; legible UI text where possible; no stock photos; no watermark; no oversized decorative graphics; no nested cards
constraints: legible UI; no watermark; no stock-photo hero; no nested cards

prompt:
Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: web application UI concept, desktop dashboard screen
Primary request: Design an enterprise-grade debt tracker and receivables management host dashboard with strong reporting, auditability, Google login, Google Calendar follow-up scheduling, and WhatsApp reminder automation.
Screen content: left sidebar with modules; top security/account bar; KPI strip for outstanding, overdue, recovery rate, high risk accounts; central aging report table; right-side calendar and reminder automation panel; customer risk scoring; payment history timeline; audit log preview; filter controls for date range, collector, status, and region.
Style/medium: enterprise finance dashboard, restrained professional UI, light gray background, graphite text, blue and green status colors, red overdue alerts, data-grid focused, high-fidelity web app mockup
Composition/framing: 16:9 desktop screenshot, structured admin dashboard for managers, information-rich but clean
Text (verbatim): "Receivables Control", "Google SSO", "Calendar follow-ups", "WhatsApp automation", "Aging Report", "Risk Score", "Audit Log", "Collector Performance"
Constraints: make it feel scalable and credible; legible UI text where possible; no marketing content; no decorative art; no watermark
constraints: legible UI; no watermark; no marketing content; no decorative art

prompt:
Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: web application UI concept, desktop dashboard screen
Primary request: Design a mobile-first inspired web dashboard for a debt tracker, optimized for businesses that work heavily from phones and WhatsApp, but shown as a desktop web app. Include Google login and Google Calendar connection.
Screen content: compact left rail, top account area with Google profile, large action toolbar, debt cards grouped by Today, Overdue, Promised, and Settled; WhatsApp reminder composer with tone chips polite, friendly, firm; Google Calendar mini agenda; partial payment progress bars; payment timeline; proof attachments; reports summary.
Style/medium: lively productivity app, clean white background with dark charcoal, emerald, sky blue, and orange status accents; rounded compact components, touch-friendly spacing, bold clear numbers
Composition/framing: 16:9 desktop dashboard showing responsive card-based host/admin overview
Text (verbatim): "Collectly", "Google login active", "Sync Calendar", "Send WhatsApp", "Polite", "Friendly", "Firm", "Due Today", "Overdue"
Constraints: no landing page; no large hero; no decorative blobs; legible UI text where possible; no watermark; keep it business-like
constraints: legible UI; no watermark; no decorative blobs; no landing page

prompt:
Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: web application UI concept, desktop dashboard screen
Primary request: Design a premium dark-mode host dashboard for a debt tracker web app. The app manages customer debts, payment collection, partial payments, WhatsApp reminders, Google login, and Google Calendar scheduling.
Screen content: dark sidebar navigation, top Google account and calendar sync controls, KPI cards for total debt, overdue debt, paid this month, expected collections; main chart for cash recovery; overdue debt table; WhatsApp reminders panel with scheduled, sent, failed, replied statuses; Google Calendar agenda; recent payment activity; risk customers.
Style/medium: premium dark fintech operations dashboard, deep charcoal background, clean white text, cyan, lime, amber, and red status accents, glass-free flat surfaces, sharp data visualization, high-fidelity UI mockup
Composition/framing: 16:9 desktop dashboard, sophisticated but usable
Text (verbatim): "DebtPilot", "Continue with Google", "Calendar connected", "WhatsApp reminders", "Recovery Trend", "High Risk", "Partial payment", "Settled"
Constraints: no purple-heavy gradient look; no decorative orbs; legible UI text where possible; no watermark; no marketing hero
constraints: legible UI; no watermark; no purple-heavy gradients; no decorative orbs
